overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic urban environment (Cyberpunk 2077), showing a player navigating a city intersection and walking along a sidewalk beneath elevated highways. The scene features distinctive cyberpunk architecture with large industrial buildings, digital billboards, and various vehicles and pedestrians.

black armored truck passes from right to left through intersection

agents.ego_description: standing at street corner observing traffic before crossing

black armored truck following behind the green truck through intersection

segments.scene_description: The player stands at a futuristic city intersection with a large industrial building dominating the background. Two large military-style trucks pass through the intersection from right to left while the player waits at the corner near a traffic light and commercial building.

scene_state.functional_zone: crossing intersection toward sidewalk with industrial buildings

events.description: begins walking across the crosswalk from the corner
approaching blue-haired pedestrian standing on the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the marked crosswalk toward a pedestrian on the opposite sidewalk

elevated pedestrian bridge or highway structure in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the wide intersection over a marked crosswalk, moving toward the opposite sidewalk where a distinctive blue-haired pedestrian stands. The large industrial building shifts to the left as the player approaches an orange industrial building and overhead walkway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beneath elevated highway with digital advertising

events.description: turns left onto sidewalk beneath multi-level concrete overpass
police car with flashing lights passes by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the overpass, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in business suit walking toward the camera on the sidewalk
man in yellow jacket walking past the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: massive elevated highway structure with multiple levels casting shadows
series of large illuminated advertising screens mounted on the overpass supports
brownish bushes and dry grass growing along the base of the overpass
green metal safety barrier separating sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The player turns onto a sidewalk running beneath a massive concrete highway overpass. Digital billboards line the right side above dry vegetation, while a green railing separates the walkway from the street. Various pedestrians pass by as vehicles including a police car drive along the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching intersection under elevated highway system

events.description: approaching traffic light showing red signal for pedestrians
slowing down as approaching the crosswalk under the overpass

agents.ego_description: continuing along the overpass sidewalk, following a pedestrian toward the next intersection

notable_agents.action: heavyset man in red shirt walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the intersection

entered.detail: pedestrian and vehicle traffic signal showing red hand symbol
tall palm tree visible beyond the railing near the intersection

segments.scene_description: The player continues walking beneath the sprawling overpass system, following a pedestrian ahead toward the next intersection. Traffic lights and palm trees become visible as the sidewalk opens up, with vehicles passing on the left and digital billboards now further in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective moving from a wide, industrial city intersection into the sheltered corridor of a massive highway overpass. It begins at a street corner dominated by a large industrial building, where military-style trucks rumble through the intersection. As the camera crosses the marked crosswalk toward a blue-haired pedestrian, the perspective shifts away from the first industrial structure and toward an orange building and an overhead walkway. The scene then turns onto a sidewalk running beneath a sprawling concrete overpass, passing digital billboards and a green railing while police cars and pedestrians populate the roadside. Finally, the path opens up toward a new intersection, revealing palm trees and traffic lights as the overpass system recedes into the distance.
